summary: The diff implements fixes for both REQ-1 (guest player manual add) and REQ-2 (registered player manual add) on the Host Session Dashboard. The changes span the backend (main.mo), frontend query hooks (useQueries.ts), error handling utilities (errorHandling.ts), and the HostSessionDashboard.tsx component. The implementation covers the guest add flow with Ghost icon and amber styling, the registered player search-and-add flow, proper error handling with typed error kinds, and session cache invalidation on success.
